text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of summer camp. I've prepared two different
training regimens for Admire Vega.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In short, there's one she can do alone and another that would require
the two of us to work as a team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I show her both options and make it clear that I'm fine with either, but
she's taking an uncharacteristically long time to respond.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Let me think about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She takes both printouts and heads to her lodging.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (These regimens... they're both really well-thought-out.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Even the most basic exercises have been tweaked to bring out my
strengths...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (The whole training program is tailored for my running... for me.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer said either one is fine, but it's obvious when you compare
them—what I need right now... is to work together with my trainer.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (But still...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Trainer? About my regimen, um...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I... I think...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That I... I need...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She struggles to find the words. Her answer is already formed—she
just can't bring herself to say it out loud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can tell she doesn't want to hurt my feelings.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She chooses the solo regimen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her progress, taking notes like always. I'll gladly do whatever I
can to support her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At night, I crack open her recommended reading and gaze up at the
sky, where the Summer Triangle stands out above the rest.
choice_data_list:
Vega, and Deneb, and... what was the third
one?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm flipping through the book, trying to find the right page, when...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Altair... The brightest star in Aquila.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega appears beside me.
choice_data_list: Here to see the stars too?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah... guess so.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Training today was... nice. It felt worthwhile... like I was making real
progress.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... But, um...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...The more you do for my sake, the more my heart hurts.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
All your expectations, your hard work, they... they should've been for
my sister, not me...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And yet... here I am...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't claim to know much about her sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do know, however, that her sister is very dear to her... and also a
source of great heartache.
choice_data_list: If you're running for your sister's sake...
If you're running for your sister's sake...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the schedules I put together, all the advice I give—they're not
meant for her alone.
choice_data_list: Then everything I do is for both of you.
Then everything I do is for both of you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: For... us?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Both me... and her...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Ah... so that's what it was.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (That time I turned back without going to see the stars...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Or started a conversation at the planetarium...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Maybe that wasn't me... but us all along.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She takes a seat next to me, looks up at the dazzling sky...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I guess I could teach you a thing or two.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And whispers to me the secrets of stars that traveled light years to
shine brilliantly here tonight.
